title: Playbook: Campaign / automation stopped sending (read-only triage)

predicates.noError: !/Couldn.t load|Failed to fetch|Something went wrong|Not Found|404 - File/i.test((document.title||'')+' '+(document.body.textContent||'').slice(0,240))

preflight.note: off-camera: stage the persisted rail-panel preference expanded (.wc-rail-panel-toggle, 'Hide panel' when open; probe-verified both directions July 11 on 9226). The Marketing sub-sidebar must be visible so step-4 can click the Deliverability link on camera. Skipped when already expanded (the observed default).

ops.note: pre-roll: start page staged on Marketing → Campaigns
pre-roll: preflight left the sub-sidebar expanded
pre-roll: 5 campaign rows + KPI band + 'of 5' counter, no agent-service error
enter from the bottom edge toward the KPI strip as p01 says 'Start in Marketing, on Campaigns'
p02 'Four tiles across the top' — begin the left-to-right sweep
p02 sweep across the four tiles
p02 land on the headline tile 'Sent This Month' (live reads 6,370 — see RESIDUAL R1; narration says zero)
p03 'confirms it at the network level' — hold on the Sent This Month tile
p04-p05 ease below the band ('Sends have stalled' / 'bigger than one missed text')
step 2 cue p06 'Drop to the campaign list. Read, don't click.'
p07 'The column that matters is status.'
p08 'A draft was never launched.' — the Monthly Newsletter status cell (Draft)
p09 'A completed campaign already finished its run.' — Win-Back October status cell (Completed)
p10 'Neither will send now.' — ease between the two ineligible rows
p11 'Only scheduled and active campaigns are eligible' — Holiday Referral (Scheduled)
p11 — Summer Unlimited (Active)
step 3 cue p12 'Look closer at the eligible rows'
p13 'Two carry a pill: weather paused, six locations' (camera punches in here)
p14 'a built-in hold, not an error'
p15 'holding sends at those six sites on purpose'
p16 'Name the pill in the ticket, and route the config question' — RESIDUAL R2 (config surface not observable; PARKED #6)
p17 'Where it is set is not visible here'
step 4 stage: ease toward the Marketing sub-sidebar for the Deliverability nav
step 4 cue p18 'Now Marketing, Deliverability' — approach the sidebar link
step 4: genuine Marketing sub-sidebar navigation to Deliverability (pure <a href>). Press inside the p18→p19 gap (55.81–57.03)
load check: six Deliverability tabs + metric band + the alert banner, no error
p19 'The banner is the second reason a campaign goes quiet' — start at the banner headline
p20 'Spam complaints on Flash Sale Weekend hit point one eight percent' — sweep along the banner
p21 'against a point one zero threshold'
p22 guardrail: rest BESIDE 'Review campaign →' (opens the campaign edit surface) — pointed at, never clicked
guardrail proof: the page never changes while Review campaign → is pointed out
p23 'A campaign can look active and still be held here' — ease off
step 5 cue p24 'Sweep the numbers underneath' — start of the metric row
sweep to the Spam Complaint Rate tile
p25 'spam complaint rate is flagged for action' — the tile reads 0.18% · action needed (camera punches in)
p26 'That flag is what the banner reacts to'
step 5 guardrail: rest BESIDE 'Run Full Audit' — pointed at, never clicked
guardrail proof: no suppression toggle is flipped and Run Full Audit is never run — the page holds while they are pointed out (armed before the window it guards)
p27 'Below it sit the engagement suppression toggles' — the Engagement-Based Suppression section
p28 'live switches that decide who the platform stops emailing' — over the suppression toggles
p29 'Note their state' — guardrail beside the suppression switches
p30 'Never flip one while diagnosing' — hold the guardrail
step 6 stage: ease toward the bottom-left module rail for the Settings hop
step 6 cue p31 'Settings, Automation, Task Scheduler' — approach the Settings rail button
step 6a: genuine module-rail navigation to the Settings landing (settings.html). Press on p31 'Settings'
approach the Automation accordion header
step 6b: inert client-side accordion toggle (verified July 11) — expands the Automation group so Task Scheduler is reachable. Press on p31 'Automation'. No navigation, no mutation
approach the Task Scheduler link
step 6c: genuine sidebar navigation to Task Scheduler (pure <a href>). Press on p31 'Task Scheduler'
load check: KPI band (18 Total Tasks … 0 Failed) + the SMS Campaigns row. Reading phrase p32 leads the confirmed load by ~1.3s under real chained page loads (see RESIDUAL R6)
p33 'Read zero failed first' — the 0 Failed tile
p34 'The scheduling engine is healthy'
p35 'more likely a status or a guardrail than a broken job' — ease down
p36 'A positive number here would change that instantly'
step 7 cue p37 'Find the SMS Campaigns row' — the Task Name cell (camera punches in)
p38 'the heartbeat of outbound texting'
p39 'runs hourly, it last ran an hour ago' — the Schedule / Last Run cells
p40 'due again in fifty-two minutes, and its status is active' — the Next Run / Status cells
step 7 guardrail p41: rest BESIDE '+ New Record' (create surface) — pointed at, never clicked
guardrail proof: + New Record is never clicked — Task Scheduler holds while it is pointed out
p42 'That is your evidence' — ease off
step 8 stage: ease toward the Settings sub-sidebar (Automation group is still expanded)
step 8 cue p43 'Settings, Automation, Mass SMS Log' — approach the Mass SMS Log link (already in the expanded Automation group; one genuine click completes it)
step 8: genuine sidebar navigation to Mass SMS Log (pure <a href>). Press inside the p43→p44 gap (137.85–138.43)
load check: the Date · Phone · Email · Barcode · Status columns render (live loads with 4 entries — see RESIDUAL R4; narration says fetch error / zero)
p44 'One row per recipient, with a status on each' — sweep the column headers
p44 sweep across to the Status column
p45 'a fetch error and zero entries' — the Total Entries counter (live reads 4, loaded — RESIDUAL R4)
step 8 guardrail p46: rest BESIDE '+ New Record' — pointed at, never clicked
guardrail proof: + New Record is never clicked — the log page holds
p47 'Confirm the data loaded before you tell anyone the messages never went out' — toward the search / counter
step 9 stage: ease toward the module rail for the Billing hop
step 9 cue p48 'Open Billing, then Usage and Billing' — approach the Billing rail button
step 9: genuine module-rail navigation; Usage & Billing is the Billing default, so this lands on billing-usage.html. Press inside the p48→p49 gap (157.25–157.71)
load check: Overview tab + Invoices tab + Usage by Source panel, no error
p49 'Two tabs matter' — the tab bar (opens on Overview)
guardrail proof: Spending Alerts is never opened and Export CSV is never clicked — Billing holds on the Overview tab (armed before the window it guards)
p50 'Invoices shows one open, an unpaid bill' — the Invoices 1 open tab
p51 'Spending Alerts is where a usage cap would live' — pointed at from BESIDE; the tab is NOT opened (contents TBD — parked, only Overview in corpus)
p52 'Both are places to check, not confirmed causes' — ease
p53 'Name the tab and the count' — the Invoices 1 open tab
p54 'Do not assert the mechanism' — guardrail beside Export CSV, never clicked
guardrail proof: reading Usage by Source changes nothing — Billing holds (armed before the window it guards)
step 10 cue p55 'Stay on Overview and read Usage by Source'
p56 'a campaign, an automation, or a transactional send' — the Source / Type columns
p57 'with volume and cost this period' — across to the Volume / Cost columns
p58 'this panel settles it'
p59 'did it send anything this month, and how much'
guardrail proof: the escalation is packaged from what was read — nothing on Billing is touched (armed before the window it guards)
step 11 cue p60 'Now build the ticket' — packaging recap; no new surface, hold on Billing
p61 'campaign name, its type and status chip, the weather pause pill if present'
p62 'The deliverability signal'
p63 'The scheduler timestamps, last run and next run'
p64 'State which gate you found'
p65 'Resuming the campaign happens in production with the right role'
p66 'Never here' — ease toward a rest point
step 12 stage: ease toward the top of the module rail for the Marketing return
step 12 cue p67 'That's the narrowing flow' — approach the Marketing rail button
step 12: genuine module-rail return to Marketing → Campaigns. Press inside the p67→p68 gap (212.79–213.13)
back on the Campaign List, still 5 records — nothing was changed anywhere in the walk
step 12 recap p68 'Status first, because draft and completed never send' — the Status column
p69 'Deliverability for a reputation hold' — gesture toward the Marketing sub-sidebar
p70 'Task Scheduler for the heartbeat' — gesture toward the Settings rail
p71 'The log for the trail'
p72 'Billing for a cap or an open invoice' — gesture toward the Billing rail
p73 'You escalated with evidence and moved nothing' — final park, clear of content and burned captions
read-only triage ends on the unchanged Campaign List

callouts.note: step 1: the KPI strip — 'Sent This Month' is the headline read
step 2: the Status column — Draft & Completed never send; Scheduled & Active are eligible
step 3: the weather-paused pill (built-in hold, not an error)
step 4: the deliverability alert banner — pausing additional sends recommended
step 5: Spam Complaint Rate flagged for action + the do-not-flip suppression toggles
step 6: the Task Scheduler KPI band — read 0 Failed first (engine healthy)
step 7: the SMS Campaigns scheduler row — the outbound-text heartbeat
step 8: the Mass SMS Log columns — the per-message send trail
step 9: the Billing tabs — Invoices 1 open and Spending Alerts (plausible gates)
step 10: Usage by Source — did the named campaign send anything this period
step 11: package the escalation (name · type + status chip · deliverability signal · scheduler timestamps)
step 12: recap — Status → Deliverability → Task Scheduler → Log → Billing, all read-only

p13-p15 the weather-paused pill on Holiday Referral (Scheduled)
p13-p15 the weather-paused pill on Summer Unlimited (Active)
step 4 STOP guardrail: Review campaign → (edit surface) — never clicked
p25 Spam Complaint Rate · action needed
step 5 STOP guardrail: Run Full Audit — never clicked
step 5 STOP guardrail: Engagement-Based Suppression toggles — noted, never flipped
step 7 STOP guardrail: + New Record (create surface) — never clicked
p37-p40 the SMS Campaigns row (Hourly · 1 hour ago · In 52 min · Active)
p44 the five Mass SMS Log columns
step 8 STOP guardrail: + New Record — never clicked
step 9 STOP guardrail: Spending Alerts — pointed at, never opened (contents TBD — parked)
step 9 STOP guardrail: Export CSV — never clicked
p56-p59 Usage by Source rows (Campaign / Automation / Transactional)
